target.rawSql:
WITH ext AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT date_trunc('minute', timestamp) AS t, session
  FROM prices
  WHERE session IN ('premarket', 'afterhours')
    AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
),
marked AS (
  SELECT
    t,
    session,
    CASE
      WHEN LAG(t) OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY t) IS NULL
        OR t - LAG(t) OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY t) > interval '20 minutes'
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS new_island
  FROM ext
),
grouped AS (
  SELECT t, session, SUM(new_island) OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY t) AS g
  FROM marked
)
SELECT
  MIN(t) AS time,
  MAX(t) + interval '10 minutes' AS "timeEnd",
  CASE WHEN session = 'premarket' THEN 'Pre-market' ELSE 'After-hours' END AS text
FROM grouped
GROUP BY session, g
ORDER BY time;

WITH active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT date_trunc('minute', timestamp) AS t
  FROM prices
  WHERE session IN ('premarket', 'regular', 'afterhours')
    AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
),
seq AS (
  SELECT t, LEAD(t) OVER (ORDER BY t) AS next_t
  FROM active
)
SELECT
  t + interval '10 minutes' AS time,
  next_t AS "timeEnd",
  'Closed' AS text
FROM seq
WHERE next_t - t > interval '60 minutes'
ORDER BY t;

links.title: Run Sync
links.tooltip: Manually trigger the portfolio sync service

panels.description: Type a ticker into the External Ticker field above. This panel generates a Yahoo Finance quote link even for symbols not in current holdings.

targets.rawSql:
WITH typed AS (
  SELECT upper(regexp_replace(${external_ticker:sqlstring}, '[^A-Za-z0-9.\-]', '', 'g')) AS ticker
)
SELECT
  ticker,
  'https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/' || ticker AS yahoo_quote
FROM typed
WHERE ticker <> '';

panels.title: External Ticker Link

panels.description: Always shows all accounts. Selected account is marked with a star.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
)
SELECT
  account_name,
  ROUND(
    CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide'
      THEN raw_value / NULLIF(SUM(raw_value) OVER (), 0) * 100
      ELSE raw_value
    END::numeric, 2) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN s.account_name IS NOT NULL AND h.account_name = s.account_name
        THEN '★ ' || h.account_name
      ELSE h.account_name
    END AS account_name,
    SUM(COALESCE(h.shares * lp.latest_price, h.market_value)) AS raw_value
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  LEFT JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  GROUP BY 1
) q
ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.title: Account Allocation

panels.description: Sum across holdings of shares x (latest price − last known regular-session close). Honors Account and Price Session toggles.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price,
    timestamp AS latest_ts
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
),
regular_closes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker, timestamp::date)
    ticker,
    timestamp::date AS session_date,
    price AS close_price,
    timestamp AS close_ts
  FROM prices
  WHERE session = 'regular'
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp::date, timestamp DESC
),
prev_close AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (rc.ticker)
    rc.ticker,
    rc.close_price
  FROM regular_closes rc
  JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = rc.ticker
  WHERE rc.close_ts < lp.latest_ts
  ORDER BY rc.ticker, rc.close_ts DESC
),
port AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(h.shares * lp.latest_price, h.market_value)), 0) AS total
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  LEFT JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide'
    THEN ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(h.shares * (lp.latest_price - pc.close_price)), 0)
                / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM port), 0) * 100)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(h.shares * (lp.latest_price - pc.close_price)), 0)::numeric, 2)
  END AS today_change
FROM holdings h
CROSS JOIN selected_account s
JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
JOIN prev_close pc ON pc.ticker = h.ticker
WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name);

panels.title: Change Since Last Close

panels.description: Filters by Account variable: All, J-RTH, or S-RTH.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL
       ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(h.shares * lp.latest_price, h.market_value)), 0)::numeric, 2)
  END AS portfolio_value
FROM holdings h
CROSS JOIN selected_account s
LEFT JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name);

panels.title: Total Portfolio Value

panels.description: Historical shares × historical price. Price Session=Include Extended uses all price rows; Regular Only uses session='regular'.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
filtered_holdings AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', h.snapshot_time) AS snapshot_minute,
    h.ticker,
    SUM(h.shares) AS shares
  FROM holdings_history h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
),
ticker_value AS (
  SELECT
    h.ticker,
    SUM(h.shares * lp.latest_price) AS pos_value
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
  GROUP BY h.ticker
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ticker,
    pos_value,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pos_value DESC NULLS LAST) AS rnk
  FROM ticker_value
),
series AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', p.timestamp) AS t,
    p.ticker AS metric,
    AVG(p.price * fh.shares) AS value
  FROM filtered_prices p
  JOIN filtered_holdings fh
    ON fh.ticker = p.ticker
   AND fh.snapshot_minute = date_trunc('minute', p.timestamp)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric)
    metric,
    value AS base_value
  FROM series
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t)
  ORDER BY metric, t ASC
)
SELECT
  s.t AS "time",
  s.metric AS metric,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide'
    THEN ROUND(((s.value - b.base_value) / NULLIF(b.base_value, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE ROUND(s.value::numeric, 2)
  END AS value
FROM series s
LEFT JOIN ranked tv ON tv.ticker = s.metric
LEFT JOIN base b ON b.metric = s.metric
WHERE COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) <= 5
  AND '${show_n}'::int > 0
  AND COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) <= '${show_n}'::int
  AND ('${dollars}' <> 'hide' OR ($__timeFilter(s.t) AND b.base_value IS NOT NULL AND b.base_value <> 0))
ORDER BY s.t, tv.pos_value DESC NULLS LAST;

WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
filtered_holdings AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', h.snapshot_time) AS snapshot_minute,
    h.ticker,
    SUM(h.shares) AS shares
  FROM holdings_history h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
),
ticker_value AS (
  SELECT
    h.ticker,
    SUM(h.shares * lp.latest_price) AS pos_value
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
  GROUP BY h.ticker
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ticker,
    pos_value,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pos_value DESC NULLS LAST) AS rnk
  FROM ticker_value
),
series AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', p.timestamp) AS t,
    p.ticker AS metric,
    AVG(p.price * fh.shares) AS value
  FROM filtered_prices p
  JOIN filtered_holdings fh
    ON fh.ticker = p.ticker
   AND fh.snapshot_minute = date_trunc('minute', p.timestamp)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric)
    metric,
    value AS base_value
  FROM series
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t)
  ORDER BY metric, t ASC
)
SELECT
  s.t AS "time",
  s.metric AS metric,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide'
    THEN ROUND(((s.value - b.base_value) / NULLIF(b.base_value, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE ROUND(s.value::numeric, 2)
  END AS value
FROM series s
LEFT JOIN ranked tv ON tv.ticker = s.metric
LEFT JOIN base b ON b.metric = s.metric
WHERE COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) > 5
  AND ('${show_n}'::int < 0 OR COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) <= '${show_n}'::int)
  AND ('${dollars}' <> 'hide' OR ($__timeFilter(s.t) AND b.base_value IS NOT NULL AND b.base_value <> 0))
ORDER BY s.t, tv.pos_value DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.title: Position Value History

panels.description: Each holding's % change from its price at the start of the selected time range. Every series starts at 0 at the window start and moves with the time range.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
eligible_tickers AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT h.ticker
  FROM holdings_history h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
),
ticker_value AS (
  SELECT
    h.ticker,
    SUM(h.shares * lp.latest_price) AS pos_value
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
  GROUP BY h.ticker
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ticker,
    pos_value,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pos_value DESC NULLS LAST) AS rnk
  FROM ticker_value
),
windowed AS (
  SELECT
    fp.ticker,
    fp.timestamp,
    fp.price
  FROM filtered_prices fp
  JOIN eligible_tickers e ON e.ticker = fp.ticker
  WHERE $__timeFilter(fp.timestamp)
),
baseline AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS base_price
  FROM windowed
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp ASC
)
SELECT
  w.timestamp AS "time",
  w.ticker AS metric,
  ROUND(((w.price - b.base_price) / b.base_price * 100)::numeric, 2) AS value
FROM windowed w
JOIN baseline b ON b.ticker = w.ticker
LEFT JOIN ranked tv ON tv.ticker = w.ticker
WHERE b.base_price <> 0
  AND COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) <= 5
  AND '${show_n}'::int > 0
  AND COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) <= '${show_n}'::int
ORDER BY w.timestamp, tv.pos_value DESC NULLS LAST;

WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
eligible_tickers AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT h.ticker
  FROM holdings_history h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
),
ticker_value AS (
  SELECT
    h.ticker,
    SUM(h.shares * lp.latest_price) AS pos_value
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
  GROUP BY h.ticker
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ticker,
    pos_value,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pos_value DESC NULLS LAST) AS rnk
  FROM ticker_value
),
windowed AS (
  SELECT
    fp.ticker,
    fp.timestamp,
    fp.price
  FROM filtered_prices fp
  JOIN eligible_tickers e ON e.ticker = fp.ticker
  WHERE $__timeFilter(fp.timestamp)
),
baseline AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS base_price
  FROM windowed
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp ASC
)
SELECT
  w.timestamp AS "time",
  w.ticker AS metric,
  ROUND(((w.price - b.base_price) / b.base_price * 100)::numeric, 2) AS value
FROM windowed w
JOIN baseline b ON b.ticker = w.ticker
LEFT JOIN ranked tv ON tv.ticker = w.ticker
WHERE b.base_price <> 0
  AND COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) > 5
  AND ('${show_n}'::int < 0 OR COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) <= '${show_n}'::int)
ORDER BY w.timestamp, tv.pos_value DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.title: Position Deviation History

panels.description: Price history for tickers held by the selected account. Price Session=Include Extended uses all price rows; Regular Only uses session='regular'.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
eligible_tickers AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    date_trunc('minute', h.snapshot_time) AS snapshot_minute,
    h.ticker
  FROM holdings_history h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
),
ticker_value AS (
  SELECT
    h.ticker,
    SUM(h.shares * lp.latest_price) AS pos_value
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
  GROUP BY h.ticker
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ticker,
    pos_value,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pos_value DESC NULLS LAST) AS rnk
  FROM ticker_value
),
series AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', p.timestamp) AS t,
    p.ticker AS metric,
    AVG(p.price) AS value
  FROM filtered_prices p
  JOIN eligible_tickers e
    ON e.ticker = p.ticker
   AND e.snapshot_minute = date_trunc('minute', p.timestamp)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric)
    metric,
    value AS base_value
  FROM series
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t)
  ORDER BY metric, t ASC
)
SELECT
  s.t AS "time",
  s.metric AS metric,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide'
    THEN ROUND(((s.value - b.base_value) / NULLIF(b.base_value, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE ROUND(s.value::numeric, 2)
  END AS value
FROM series s
LEFT JOIN ranked tv ON tv.ticker = s.metric
LEFT JOIN base b ON b.metric = s.metric
WHERE COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) <= 5
  AND '${show_n}'::int > 0
  AND COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) <= '${show_n}'::int
  AND ('${dollars}' <> 'hide' OR ($__timeFilter(s.t) AND b.base_value IS NOT NULL AND b.base_value <> 0))
ORDER BY s.t, tv.pos_value DESC NULLS LAST;

WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
eligible_tickers AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    date_trunc('minute', h.snapshot_time) AS snapshot_minute,
    h.ticker
  FROM holdings_history h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
),
ticker_value AS (
  SELECT
    h.ticker,
    SUM(h.shares * lp.latest_price) AS pos_value
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND h.ticker <> ALL (ARRAY[${exclude_tickers:sqlstring}]::text[])
  GROUP BY h.ticker
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ticker,
    pos_value,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pos_value DESC NULLS LAST) AS rnk
  FROM ticker_value
),
series AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', p.timestamp) AS t,
    p.ticker AS metric,
    AVG(p.price) AS value
  FROM filtered_prices p
  JOIN eligible_tickers e
    ON e.ticker = p.ticker
   AND e.snapshot_minute = date_trunc('minute', p.timestamp)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric)
    metric,
    value AS base_value
  FROM series
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t)
  ORDER BY metric, t ASC
)
SELECT
  s.t AS "time",
  s.metric AS metric,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide'
    THEN ROUND(((s.value - b.base_value) / NULLIF(b.base_value, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE ROUND(s.value::numeric, 2)
  END AS value
FROM series s
LEFT JOIN ranked tv ON tv.ticker = s.metric
LEFT JOIN base b ON b.metric = s.metric
WHERE COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) > 5
  AND ('${show_n}'::int < 0 OR COALESCE(tv.rnk, 1000000) <= '${show_n}'::int)
  AND ('${dollars}' <> 'hide' OR ($__timeFilter(s.t) AND b.base_value IS NOT NULL AND b.base_value <> 0))
ORDER BY s.t, tv.pos_value DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.title: Price History

panels.description: Largest current positions; filters by Account variable. Click a bar/value to open the ticker in Yahoo Finance.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
)
SELECT
  ticker,
  ROUND(
    CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide'
      THEN raw_value / NULLIF(SUM(raw_value) OVER (), 0) * 100
      ELSE raw_value
    END::numeric, 2) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    h.ticker,
    SUM(COALESCE(h.shares * lp.latest_price, h.market_value)) AS raw_value
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  LEFT JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
    AND COALESCE(h.shares * lp.latest_price, h.market_value) > 0
  GROUP BY h.ticker
) q
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 15;

panels.title: Largest Positions

panels.description: Account value history; filters when Account is J-RTH or S-RTH.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
price_per_min AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker, date_trunc('minute', timestamp))
    ticker,
    date_trunc('minute', timestamp) AS t,
    price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, date_trunc('minute', timestamp), timestamp DESC
),
hh AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', h.snapshot_time) AS t,
    h.account_name,
    h.ticker,
    h.shares,
    h.market_value
  FROM holdings_history h
),
series AS (
  SELECT
    hh.t AS t,
    hh.account_name AS metric,
    SUM(COALESCE(hh.shares * pm.price, hh.market_value)) AS value
  FROM hh
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  LEFT JOIN price_per_min pm ON pm.ticker = hh.ticker AND pm.t = hh.t
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR hh.account_name = s.account_name)
  GROUP BY hh.t, hh.account_name
),
base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric)
    metric,
    value AS base_value
  FROM series
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t)
  ORDER BY metric, t ASC
)
SELECT
  s.t AS "time",
  s.metric AS metric,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide'
    THEN ROUND(((s.value - b.base_value) / NULLIF(b.base_value, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE ROUND(s.value::numeric, 2)
  END AS value
FROM series s
LEFT JOIN base b ON b.metric = s.metric
WHERE ('${dollars}' <> 'hide' OR ($__timeFilter(s.t) AND b.base_value IS NOT NULL AND b.base_value <> 0))
ORDER BY s.t;

panels.title: Account Value Over Time

panels.description: When Account=All, this sums all accounts into one total portfolio line. When filtered, it shows only the selected account.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
price_per_min AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker, date_trunc('minute', timestamp))
    ticker,
    date_trunc('minute', timestamp) AS t,
    price
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, date_trunc('minute', timestamp), timestamp DESC
),
hh AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', h.snapshot_time) AS t,
    h.account_name,
    h.ticker,
    h.shares,
    h.market_value
  FROM holdings_history h
),
series AS (
  SELECT
    hh.t AS t,
    CASE
      WHEN s.account_name IS NULL THEN 'Total Portfolio'
      ELSE hh.account_name
    END AS metric,
    SUM(COALESCE(hh.shares * pm.price, hh.market_value)) AS value
  FROM hh
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  LEFT JOIN price_per_min pm ON pm.ticker = hh.ticker AND pm.t = hh.t
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR hh.account_name = s.account_name)
  GROUP BY
    hh.t,
    CASE
      WHEN s.account_name IS NULL THEN 'Total Portfolio'
      ELSE hh.account_name
    END
),
base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric)
    metric,
    value AS base_value
  FROM series
  WHERE $__timeFilter(t)
  ORDER BY metric, t ASC
)
SELECT
  s.t AS "time",
  s.metric AS metric,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide'
    THEN ROUND(((s.value - b.base_value) / NULLIF(b.base_value, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2)
    ELSE ROUND(s.value::numeric, 2)
  END AS value
FROM series s
LEFT JOIN base b ON b.metric = s.metric
WHERE ('${dollars}' <> 'hide' OR ($__timeFilter(s.t) AND b.base_value IS NOT NULL AND b.base_value <> 0))
ORDER BY s.t;

panels.title: Portfolio Value Over Time

panels.description: Current holdings. latest_price follows the Price Session switch. regular_open_price/day_change need true regular-session rows.

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_account AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN '${switch0}' = 'All' THEN NULL
    ELSE '${switch0}'
  END AS account_name
),
filtered_prices AS (
  SELECT
    p.*
  FROM prices p
  WHERE (
    '${session_filter}' <> 'Regular Only'
    OR p.session = 'regular'
  )
),
latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ticker)
    ticker,
    price AS latest_price,
    timestamp AS latest_price_time,
    session AS latest_session,
    source AS latest_source
  FROM filtered_prices
  ORDER BY ticker, timestamp DESC
),
last_regular_session_by_ticker AS (
  SELECT
    ticker,
    MAX(timestamp::date) AS session_date
  FROM prices
  WHERE session = 'regular'
  GROUP BY ticker
),
regular_open_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (p.ticker)
    p.ticker,
    p.price AS regular_open_price,
    p.timestamp AS regular_open_time
  FROM prices p
  JOIN last_regular_session_by_ticker lrs
    ON lrs.ticker = p.ticker
   AND lrs.session_date = p.timestamp::date
  WHERE p.session = 'regular'
  ORDER BY p.ticker, p.timestamp ASC
),
holdings_with_prices AS (
  SELECT
    h.ticker,
    h.market_value,
    h.shares,
    h.cost_basis AS avg_cost_basis,
    h.shares * h.cost_basis AS total_cost_basis,
    lp.latest_price,
    lp.latest_price_time,
    lp.latest_session,
    lp.latest_source,
    rop.regular_open_price,
    rop.regular_open_time,
    h.account_name,
    COALESCE(h.shares * lp.latest_price, h.market_value) AS current_value
  FROM holdings h
  CROSS JOIN selected_account s
  LEFT JOIN latest_prices lp ON lp.ticker = h.ticker
  LEFT JOIN regular_open_prices rop ON rop.ticker = h.ticker
  WHERE (s.account_name IS NULL OR h.account_name = s.account_name)
)
SELECT
  ticker,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(current_value::numeric, 2) END AS market_value,
  shares,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(avg_cost_basis::numeric, 2) END AS avg_cost_basis,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(total_cost_basis::numeric, 2) END AS total_cost_basis,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE latest_price END AS latest_price,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE regular_open_price END AS regular_open_price,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL
       ELSE ROUND((shares * (latest_price - regular_open_price))::numeric, 2) END AS day_change,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL
       ELSE ROUND(
         CASE
           WHEN regular_open_price IS NULL OR regular_open_price = 0 THEN NULL
           ELSE ((latest_price - regular_open_price) / regular_open_price * 100)::numeric
         END, 2)
  END AS day_change_pct,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL
       ELSE ROUND((current_value - total_cost_basis)::numeric, 2) END AS total_change,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL
       ELSE ROUND(
         CASE
           WHEN total_cost_basis IS NULL OR total_cost_basis = 0 THEN NULL
           ELSE ((current_value - total_cost_basis) / total_cost_basis * 100)::numeric
         END, 2)
  END AS total_change_pct,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE latest_session END AS latest_session,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE latest_source END AS latest_source,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE latest_price_time END AS latest_price_time,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE regular_open_time END AS regular_open_time,
  CASE WHEN '${dollars}' = 'hide' THEN NULL ELSE account_name END AS account_name
FROM holdings_with_prices
ORDER BY holdings_with_prices.account_name, holdings_with_prices.current_value DESC;

panels.title: Current Holdings

list.definition:
SELECT
  account_name AS __text,
  account_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT account_name
  FROM holdings
  WHERE account_name IS NOT NULL AND account_name <> ''

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT account_name
  FROM holdings_history
  WHERE account_name IS NOT NULL AND account_name <> ''

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT account_name
  FROM portfolio_snapshots
  WHERE account_name IS NOT NULL AND account_name <> ''
) accounts
ORDER BY account_name;
list.description: Dynamically lists accounts found in holdings, holdings_history, or portfolio_snapshots.
list.label: Account
list.name: switch0

query.rawSql:
SELECT
  account_name AS __text,
  account_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT account_name
  FROM holdings
  WHERE account_name IS NOT NULL AND account_name <> ''

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT account_name
  FROM holdings_history
  WHERE account_name IS NOT NULL AND account_name <> ''

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT account_name
  FROM portfolio_snapshots
  WHERE account_name IS NOT NULL AND account_name <> ''
) accounts
ORDER BY account_name;

list.description: Include Extended uses all rows in prices. Regular Only uses only prices where session='regular'.
list.label: Session
list.name: session_filter
list.query: Incl Ext : Include Extended, Regular : Regular Only

list.description: How many holdings to show in the history charts: All, a number (top N), or -Top5 (all except the top 5). Top 5 render solid, the rest dotted.
list.label: Tikr
list.name: show_n

list.definition:
SELECT ticker AS __text, ticker AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ticker FROM holdings WHERE ticker IS NOT NULL AND ticker <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT ticker FROM holdings_history WHERE ticker IS NOT NULL AND ticker <> ''
) t
ORDER BY ticker;
list.description: Tickers to exclude from the three history graphs. Leave empty to include all.
list.label: Exclude
list.name: exclude_tickers

query.rawSql:
SELECT ticker AS __text, ticker AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ticker FROM holdings WHERE ticker IS NOT NULL AND ticker <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT ticker FROM holdings_history WHERE ticker IS NOT NULL AND ticker <> ''
) t
ORDER BY ticker;

list.description: Type any ticker to generate a Yahoo Finance quote link. Example: AMZN.
list.label: Lookup
list.name: external_ticker
